title: theobroma bernoullii
intro: Theobroma bernoullii, also known as the wild cacao tree, is a species of flowering plant that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a close relative of the cacao tree from which chocolate is derived and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Theobroma bernoullii include reducing inflammation and improving heart health, as well as supporting the immune system and protecting against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used to make a range of traditional medicines in its native regions.
